Mineral Commodities Ltd ( (AU:MRC) ) has issued an announcement.

Mineral Commodities Ltd announced the cessation of 1,866,666 performance rights due to the expiry of options or other convertible securities without exercise or conversion as of June 30, 2025. Orica Limited ( (AU:ORI) ) has issued an update.

Orica Limited has announced a daily update on its ongoing on-market buy-back program, revealing that a total of 216,678 ordinary fully paid securities were bought back on the previous day, adding to the cumulative total of 7,714,664 securities repurchased to date. This buy-back initiative is part of Orica’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and deliver value to its shareholders, potentially impacting its stock market performance and stakeholder confidence.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ORI) stock is a Buy with a A$22.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Orica Limited stock, see the AU:ORI Stock Forecast page.

More about Orica Limited

Orica Limited is a company operating in the chemicals industry, primarily focusing on the production of explosives and blasting systems for the mining, quarrying, and construction sectors. The company is known for its market-leading solutions and services that enhance productivity and safety in these industries.

data.title: Red White & Bloom Faces Cease Trade Order Amid Filing Delays
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

An announcement from Red White & Bloom Brands ( (TSE:RWB) ) is now available.

Red White & Bloom Brands Inc. announced an update regarding the management cease trade order issued by the British Columbia Securities Commission due to delays in filing their audited financial statements and related management’s discussion and analysis for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. The company requested an extension, which was denied, resulting in a Failure-to-File Cease Trade Order effective July 3, 2025. Despite this, the company remains confident it will complete its filings ahead of the Annual General Meeting on July 11, 2025, and will continue to comply with reporting requirements by submitting bi-weekly default status reports.

More about Red White & Bloom Brands

Red White & Bloom Brands is a multi-jurisdictional cannabis operator and house of premium brands operating in the United States, Canada, and select international jurisdictions. The company primarily focuses its investments on major U.S. markets, including California, Florida, Missouri, Michigan, and Ohio, along with Canadian and international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 144,325

Current Market Cap: C$16.46M

For detailed information about RWB stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Lanthanein Resources Announces Entitlement Issue and Proposed Capital Consolidation
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Frontier Resources Limited ( (AU:LNR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Lanthanein Resources Ltd has announced a pro-rata non-renounceable entitlement issue to raise up to $2,107,636 through the issuance of new shares. This offer is fully underwritten by Inyati Capital Pty Ltd and includes a proposed consolidation of the company’s issued capital, pending shareholder approval. The offer, however, is not contingent on the approval of this consolidation. The prospectus highlights the speculative nature of the securities and advises potential investors to seek professional advice.

More about Frontier Resources Limited

Lanthanein Resources Ltd, soon to be renamed Fortuna Metals Ltd, operates in the resources sector, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is involved in the issuance of shares and options as part of its financial strategies.

Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ) has provided an announcement.

Mare Engineering Group S.p.A. has successfully completed the subscription of an additional 34,067 shares, valued at Euro 153,301.50, as part of a capital increase initiative. This move marks the full closure of the capital increase, reflecting the company’s strategic efforts to bolster its financial position and expand its market influence.

Founded in 2001, Mare Engineering Group S.p.A. is an engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan. The company operates both in Italy and internationally, focusing on innovation through enabling technologies. With a client base exceeding 2,000 and a workforce of over 500 across 25 offices in five countries, Mare Group is a significant player in the innovation ecosystem. The company has made substantial investments in research and development and has completed 16 acquisitions since 2019 to enhance its product portfolio and market presence.

The latest update is out from Metal Hawk Ltd. ( (AU:MHK) ).

Metal Hawk Limited has commenced its maiden drilling campaign at the Leinster South Project in Western Australia, targeting the Thylacine and Siberian Tiger prospects. This initiative follows the discovery of high-grade gold in 2024, and the company plans to update investors with assay results expected in late July, which could significantly impact its operations and industry positioning.

More about Metal Hawk Ltd.

Metal Hawk Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold projects. The company is primarily engaged in identifying and drilling high-grade gold targets, with a market focus on promising regions in Western Australia.
